---
title: "Thomas Van Hoey"
subtitle: "List of Courses"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
CJKmainfont: Noto Sans CJK TC
sansfont: Georgia
mainfont: Noto Serif # Noto Serif
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


\begin{tabular}{p{1.9cm}p{11cm}p{3cm}}
2025 & Intro to Linguistics 2 (Algemene taalwetenschap 2) (F0AA4A) & KU Leuven \\
2025 & Intro to Linguistics 1 (Algemene taalwetenschap 1) (F0AA3A) & KU Leuven \\
2024 & Intro to Linguistics 1 (Algemene taalwetenschap 1) (F0AA3A) & KU Leuven \\
2024 & Language Varieties and Language Variants (F0VH3A) & KU Leuven \\
2024 & Introduction to Cognitive Linguistics (LING 7011) & HKU \\
2023 & Lexical Semantics and Lexicology  (F0TU0A) & KU Leuven \\
2022 & Introduction to Cognitive Linguistics (LING 7011) & HKU \\
2020 & English conversation A  & Tatung University \\
2019 & English conversation B & Tatung University \\
\end{tabular}
